data.body:
While we should prevent changing parent knot states that are incompatible with children, this error message shows that the safety check is broken/incorrect.  this change should obviously not require terminal_cascade_approval, because all the children are shipped.

error: terminal_cascade_approval_required: moving 'maestro-1499' to 'shipped' requires approval because all descendants will also move to that terminal state; descendants: maestro-0466 [shipped], maestro-39f5 [shipped], maestro-68bf [shipped], maestro-81a5 [shipped], maestro-a86c [shipped], maestro-b9be [shipped], maestro-bb9d [shipped], maestro-c9ab [shipped], maestro-d428 [shipped]; rerun with --cascade-terminal-descendants or approve the interactive prompt
data.title: kno update doesn't allow parent to move to shipped even though all of it's children are shipped.
